channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: UNBEATABLE coming to Switch 2 on July 27 alongside DLC ‘The Jamie Paige Content Companion’
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Physical edition also planned for all consoles.

Publisher Playstack and developer D-CELL will release a Switch 2 version of UNBEATABLE on July 27 alongside the major downloadable content “The Jamie Paige Content Companion” and a free update including a full Japanese and Chinese localization, the companies announced.

UNBEATABLE first launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam on December 9, 2025.

“The Jamie Paige Content Companion” will feature over 12 new playable songs, a third of which are all new original tracks made with musician Jamie Paige.

D-CELL also announced it will release a physical edition of UNBEATABLE for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2 in collaboration with iam8bit later this year.

Here is an overview of the game, via Playstack:

About

UNBEATABLE is a stunning hand-drawn anime inspired rhythm adventure game.

Experience what it means to be a band on the run—music is illegal in this world, but you won’t let that stop you.

Follow Beat and her bandmates through their journey of self discovery blending live song performances, spectacular set pieces and quirky rhythm mini games.

Explore a detailed open world and engage in branching conversations with several unique characters. Featuring a 100 percent original soundtrack alongside guest tracks and musical collaborations.

Gameplay

The pink-haired girl is Beat, and she is you, and you have a lot of things to worry about. The cops are everywhere, and they are mad at you for what feels like no good reason. Though it doesn’t help your case that you keep making friends with people that the cops are mad at for slightly better reasons. But what do we know?

Talk to people, help them out (or don’t), play huge concerts, and punch cops. And then run away from the cops you punched. Also there are monsters or something. Not sure what’s going on there?!?!

All of this culminates in massive setpieces where everything is at stake. The music got you here. It’ll get you through it.

Party Like It’s 1999

UNBEATABLE‘s full arcade mode is an entire game by itself with its own progression system and a full online component. There are modifiers, tons of songs (with more to come!), and a whole challenge board to beat, with things to do that range from as simple as “beat a song on easy mode” to, one may presume, something as complicated as “solve an ancient riddle while skateboarding.” That’s not a real example.

Watch a new trailer below.

Switch 2 and DLC “The Jamie Paige Content Companion” Announce Video



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/unbeatable-coming-to-switch-2-on-july-27-alongside-dlc-the-jamie-paige-content-companion
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: RACCOIN: Coin Pusher Roguelike coming to PS5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2 this fall
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Roguelike deckbuilder currently available for PC.

Publisher Playstack and developer Doraccoon will release roguelike deckbuilder RACCOIN: Coin Pusher Roguelike for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and Switch 2 this fall, the companies announced.

RACCOIN: Coin Pusher Roguelike first launched for PC via Steam on March 31.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

RACCOIN: Coin Pusher Roguelike blends the chaotic fun of classic arcade coin pushers with the element of roguelike deckbuilding. Combine special coins with powerful items to trigger satisfying synergies. It’s a nonstop dopamine rush packed into one unpredictable, coin dropping ride.

Synergizing Coins and Chaos

Discover all kinds of special coins during your runs! Combine Seed Coins with Water Coins to grow a money tree right inside your machine. Drop a Cat Coin to hunt down every last Rat Coin and rack up extra tickets. Need more points? Use a MultiCoin to boost your score across the board. Too slow? Blast a TNT Coin to trigger a massive explosion and blast every coin forward at once!

Craft Powerful Strategies with Items

Uncover over 100 unique chips that can dramatically shift the course of your run. Stack multipliers, spawn coins with extra points, or simply shake the machine when you’re running dry.

Apply special plating to your favorite coins to enhance their effects and unlock even wilder combos.

Different Characters, Distinct Playstyles

Play as one of several unique characters, each with their own set of themed coins and playstyle. Take on the role of a greedy raccoon manager who excels at math-based combos, or a quirky biologist who specializes in animal-based coins. Every character offers a fresh and wildly different way to play.

Watch a new trailer below.

Consoles Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/raccoin-coin-pusher-roguelike-coming-to-ps5-xbox-series-and-switch-2-this-fall
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
